title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts evaluates Claude Fable 5's capabilities for website design tasks through three difficulty levels, comparing it against Opus 4.8. He discusses token efficiency trade-offs and strategic use cases for different model sizes in web design automation.
writeup: Jack Roberts tests Claude Fable 5 on website design tasks across three difficulty levels and benchmarks it against Opus 4.8. The video weighs token efficiency trade-offs and maps which model size fits which web design automation job. Takeaways center on when a smaller model is the strategic choice and where its limits show, with concepts including prompt engineering, test-time compute, and model compression informing the comparison.
